children.heading: Compensation
children.label: a Compensation
children.text: Each member of the Commission shall serve without compensation, but shall be allowed travel expenses including per diem in lieu of subsistence, as authorized by , when engaged in the performance of Commission duties.section 5703 of title 5

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: 1 Appointment
children.text: The Commission shall appoint a staff director, who shall be paid at a rate not to exceed the maximum rate of basic pay under , and such professional and clerical personnel as may be reasonable and necessary to enable the Commission to carry out its duties under this subchapter without regard to the provisions of title 5 governing appointments in the competitive service, and without regard to the provisions of chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of such title, or any other provision of law, relating to the number, classification, and General Schedule rates.section 5376 of title 5

children.heading: Limitation on compensation
children.label: 2 Limitation on compensation
children.text: No employee appointed under this subsection (other than the staff director) may be compensated at a rate to exceed the maximum rate applicable to level GS–15 of the General Schedule.

children.heading: Detailed personnel
children.label: c Detailed personnel
children.text: On the request of the chairperson of the Commission, the head of any department or agency of the Federal Government is authorized to detail, without reimbursement, any personnel of the department or agency to the Commission to assist the Commission in carrying out its duties under this section. The detail of any individual may not result in the interruption or loss of civil service status or other privilege of the individual.
